name: cc-pensador
description: Pensador: PRD workflow skill and /pensador command for Claude Code. Guides LLMs through 5 sequential stages to produce high-quality Product Requirements Documents, coordinating with Codex (Stage 3) and AGY/Gemini (Stage 4) sub-agents.

plugins.name: cc-pensador
plugins.description: Pensador skill + /pensador slash command that drive a 5-stage PRD workflow: Stage 1 generates a PRD base from the Strict PRD Schema; Stage 2 expands the demand with user questions; Stage 3 delegates to Codex (effort high) for requirement refinement; Stage 4 delegates to AGY (gemini-3.1-pro-high) for gap analysis; Stage Final delivers prd.md, userhistory.md, and comunication_json.md. All dialogue routes exclusively through AskUserQuestion.
